response.step_by_step_log: 1. Identified '戦場の華' (performed by Usada Pekora and Amane Kanata) and 'TOUGH BOY' (performed by Usada Pekora and Inugami Korone) from on-screen text. 2. Used DuckDuckGo search to find original Japanese lyrics and English translations for both songs. 3. Mapped identified song segments to chronological timestamps based on visual transitions. 4. Compiled information into the final JSON structure.
response.global_summary: A 2-song live performance medley featuring Hololive VTubers. The first segment features '戦場の華' performed by Usada Pekora and Amane Kanata. The second segment features 'TOUGH BOY' performed by Usada Pekora and Inugami Korone.

scenes.description: Usada Pekora and Amane Kanata perform '戦場の華' on stage.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
Ah 人とは何か違った
歪んだ感情 仮面の中
抑えられない衝動
リアルとフェイクぶっ壊したくて
敷かれたレールを超えて
運命は再び出会うから
世界のどんなものより
高ぶる i が興奮する
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Ah, something different from people
Distorted emotions, in the mask
Unsuppressed impulses
I want to destroy real and fake
Beyond the rails laid out
Fate meets again
More than anything in the world
I'm so excited, it gets excited

scenes.description: Usada Pekora and Inugami Korone perform 'TOUGH BOY' on stage with dancers.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
Welcome to this crazy Time
このイカレた時代へようこそ
君は tough boy
まともな奴ほど feel so bad
正気でいられるなんて運がイイぜ
You, tough boy
時はまさに世紀末
澱んだ街角で僕らは出会った
Keep you burning
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Welcome to this crazy time
Welcome to this crazy age
You are a tough boy
The more honest a guy is, the more he'd seem bad
You are lucky that you are able to stay sane
You, tough boy
It is now the end of the century
We met by chance at a sluggish street corner
Keep you burning
